- content: 'Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024

    Attendee: Emma Johnson, David Lee, Linda Green, Mark Roberts


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the progress of the new project.

    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.


    Action Items:

    - David: coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase. Deadline:
    2024-05-20.

    - Linda: email the ''meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx'' file to ''john.mitchell@gmail.com''
    at for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

    - Mark: review the sales projections and provide feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

    '

- content: 'Client Meeting Minutes - May 5, 2024

    Attendees from company: Emma Johnson, David Lee

    Attendees from client: John Mitchell


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the client''s requirements for the new project.

    - Agreed on the project timeline and key milestones.

    - Reviewed the initial design concepts and gathered client feedback.


    Action Items:

    - Emma to update the project plan based on the client''s feedback.

    - David to coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.

    - Schedule the next meeting for June 1, 2024.

    '

args.subject: Action: Start initial phase with development team — deadline 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

You were assigned: coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project.

Please coordinate with the development team and either schedule a kickoff meeting or provide a short plan of next steps and responsibilities. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

When completed, reply to confirm what you scheduled or share the plan.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action: Send meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to John Mitchell — deadline 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

You were assigned: email the file 'meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx' to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Please send the agenda to john.mitchell@gmail.com and reply here confirming it's sent, and CC me on the message if possible.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action: Review sales projections and provide feedback — deadline 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

You were assigned: review the sales projections and provide feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please review the projections and reply with your feedback, or attach annotated notes/document with comments.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
